text: staircase 20mm thick polished Kota stone for riser and tread in combination with marble Synthetic enamel paint upto 1.2m height Oil bound distemper over plaster of paris on the underside of the staircase 14. Entrance, lobbies and lift areas 20mm thick polished granite stone i) Resin bounded granular textured finish ii) 20mm thick polished granite on lift facia 0.5mm thick oil coated, lineal aluminium false ceiling 15. Passage and general circulation area 20mm thick polished Kota stone with marble stone border Oil bound distemper over plaster of paris Mineral fibre board false ceiling and white wash for non false ceiling area 16. Battery room i) For dead acid batteries 20mm thick acid resistant tiles over bitumen primer 20mm thick acid resistant tiles over bitumen primer over 1.2m height and chemical resistant epoxy paint for balance height Chemical resistant epoxy paint ii) For Ni-Cd batteries 7mm thick anti-skid tiles Group-5 Oil bound distemper over plaster of paris White wash 17. Oil canal, oil room, oil purification tank and other areas where oil spillage is likely to occur Oil resistant paint(epoxy based amine cured) 150 micron primer over CC flooring Oil resistant paint up to 2.1 m height Oil bound distemper over plaster of paris for balance height White wash except oil canal area Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 7 (Civil Works) 7 - 109 18. Regeneration and other than areas requiring acid/alkali resistant treatment Cement concrete with metallic hardener topping Oil bound distemper over plaster of paris White wash 19. Covered parking area Interlocking cement concrete blocks Water proof cement paint White wash 20. Pathways including equipment installation area on top of roof 22mm thick concrete chequered tiles Note: 1. All wall and roof areas above false ceiling shall be plastered and white washed. 2. The colour and pattern of finish shall be as per approved details. 3. All material shall be of reputed and esta blished brand approved by the purchaser. 4. Wherever alternative materials are specified , the final selection rests with purchaser. 5. The finishing schedule shall al so be applicable to similar functional areas for all other buildings and facilities. 6. All the finishing materials shall be applied/ provided as per manufacturer specification and guidelines under the supervision and guidelines of manufacturer. 7.
